import io

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn label(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut state = Color.Red
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if start < i
      state = next(state)
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  state = next(state)
end

println(label(state))
